when_to_use: AI-autonomous test generation with minimal setup
Self-maintaining tests that adapt to UI changes
Codeless test automation for web application regression

pros: AI generates and maintains test cases

Smaller vendor vs Mabl or Testim

review.verdict: Promising autonomous testing bet, though Mabl and Testim have deeper track records in the same space.
review.best_for: Teams piloting AI-generated regression tests with low setup friction
review.not_for: Buyers needing proven enterprise references where Mabl or Testim lead
